senators.name: Dr. Lena Park
senators.nerdReason: M.D./Ph.D. physician-scientist. Chairs Senate Health Committee. Has cited CBO, NIH, and CDC data in every major floor speech. Authored bipartisan evidence-based mental health funding bill.

senators.name: Alex Torres
senators.nerdReason: Former tech CEO with a record of funding data-driven policy institutes. Supports expanded federal funding for STEM education. Consistently references BLS and CBO data in economic debates.

CA-12.name: Rep. Simone Wells
CA-12.nerdReason: Ph.D. in Urban Planning. Consistently cites housing research from UC Berkeley Terner Center. Co-sponsored the Evidence-Based Housing Act.

CA-13.name: Bob Cranford
CA-13.notNerdReason: Voted against CDC funding three consecutive years. Called climate science 'a liberal hoax' on record. Opposed FDAs evidence-based approval process for vaccines.
